name: Long-Haul Truck Driver with TL2 Meals and Eligible Dependant
description: Complete Marcus Thibodeau's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\thibodeau\. Save the completed return as 'marcus_thibodeau.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA TL2 Claim for Meals and Lodging form; CRA 2024 flat meal rates
metadata.key_complexity: TL2 form (80% long-haul meal deduction); separated marital status with Line 30400 eligible dependant claim; MB428 rent credit; child care expenses
